str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - programming-strategies
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Overcoming the Challenges of Balancing Coding with Life
entry.summary: Explore 15 practical strategies to overcome the challenges of balancing coding with life. From setting realistic goals to embracing self-care, this comprehensive guide offers insights to help coders achieve a harmonious work-life balance. Share with your coding community!

entry.title: How to Learn from Your Coding Mistakes
entry.summary: Transform coding mistakes into stepping stones for growth. This guide navigates the art of learning from errors, fostering a mindset of improvement. #LearnFromMistakes #CodingJourney

entry.title: How to Overcome the Fear of Not Being Able to Code from Scratch
entry.summary: Discover how to overcome the fear of coding from scratch with practical tips and strategies. From mastering the basics to embracing challenges, this guide empowers aspiring programmers. Learn, practice, and celebrate milestones on your coding journey. Share the wisdom and support others in their quest for coding success.
